title: Bifrost MCP Library Catalog
description: Schema for the community-maintained MCP server catalog served by Bifrost.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON Schema for editor IntelliSense.

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update. Optional; maintainers may bump this on merge.

servers.description: The list of MCP servers in the catalog.

description.description: Short, factual summary of what the server does.

category.description: Single category used for grouping/filtering in the UI.

connection_type.description: How clients connect to the server.

connection_url.description: Endpoint URL. Required for 'http' and 'sse' connection types.

stdio_config.description: Launch configuration. Required for 'stdio' connection type.

required_header_keys.description: Header names the user must supply when auth_type is 'headers' or 'per_user_headers'. Only key names — never include secret values.

icon_url.description: URL or path to a square icon (PNG/SVG recommended).

docs_url.description: URL to the server's documentation or homepage.

publisher.description: Person or organization that maintains the server.

tags.description: Freeform tags used for search and filtering.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary key/value metadata. Use sparingly.

envs.description: Names of environment variables the user must provide. Only names — never include secret values.
